summary: Completed Round 2 feature testing for Khmer Dubbing app. All 15 backend API tests passed (duplicate, merge, split, rename). All frontend features verified working: editable title, save indicator, search bar, color-coded rows, segment checkboxes, merge/split buttons, batch export.
passed_tests: POST /api/projects/{id}/duplicate creates copy with '(Copy)' in title
POST /api/projects/{id}/duplicate resets share_token, dubbed_audio_path, dubbed_video_path
POST /api/projects/{id}/duplicate updates status correctly based on segments
POST /api/projects/{id}/duplicate returns 404 for non-existent project
POST /api/projects/{id}/merge-segments merges 2 segments (concat text, first start to last end)
POST /api/projects/{id}/merge-segments merges 3+ segments correctly
POST /api/projects/{id}/merge-segments returns 400 for invalid segment IDs
POST /api/projects/{id}/merge-segments returns 400 for less than 2 segments
POST /api/projects/{id}/split-segment splits segment into 2 at midpoint
POST /api/projects/{id}/split-segment returns 400 for invalid segment ID
PATCH /api/projects/{id} can update title (rename)
PATCH /api/projects/{id} updates updated_at timestamp
Duplicate endpoint requires authentication
Merge segments endpoint requires authentication
Split segment endpoint requires authentication
Landing page renders correctly with all feature cards
Dashboard shows rename/duplicate/delete buttons on project cards (on hover)
Editor header shows editable title (click to rename) with pencil icon
Editor header shows save status indicator (Saved/Saving...)
Editor shows search bar above subtitle table
Editor table rows have color-coded left border per speaker
Editor table rows have checkbox for selection (for merge)
Editor shows merge button when 2+ segments selected
Editor shows split (scissors) button on each row
Editor sidebar shows 'Export All (MP3+MP4+SRT)' batch export button
Search functionality filters segments correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user (test-user-001) and session (test_session: [REDACTED]).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Round 2 features fully implemented and tested. New endpoints: /duplicate, /merge-segments, /split-segment. Frontend features: editable title (click to rename), save status indicator, search bar, color-coded speaker rows, segment checkboxes for merge selection, split buttons (scissors icon), batch export button. Test credentials: session token 'test_session: [REDACTED]'.

features_verified.duplicate_project: POST /api/projects/{id}/duplicate creates copy with '(Copy)' suffix, resets share_token and dubbed paths
features_verified.merge_segments: POST /api/projects/{id}/merge-segments merges 2+ segments, concatenates text, uses first start/last end time
features_verified.split_segment: POST /api/projects/{id}/split-segment splits segment at midpoint into 2 segments
features_verified.rename_project: PATCH /api/projects/{id} with title field updates project title
features_verified.editable_title_ui: Click on project title in editor header shows input field for inline editing
features_verified.search_segments: Search bar above subtitle table filters segments by original/translated text
features_verified.color_coded_rows: Segment rows have color-coded left border based on speaker (cyan, pink, amber, etc.)
features_verified.segment_selection: Checkboxes on each segment row for multi-select
features_verified.merge_button: Merge button appears when 2+ segments selected, shows count
features_verified.split_button: Scissors icon button on each row to split segment
